rationale: Educ. Code §22.054 governs liability of private institutions of higher education for volunteer services in schools. It is wholly unrelated to Tax Code §11.13(b) residence homestead exemption amounts.
quote: A private or independent institution of higher education is not liable for damages arising from an act or omission of a person associated with the institution
_note: No relationship between the proposed homestead exemption increase and this statute.
